reviews.review_description: This app is really disappointing. Does not work at all. It’s stuck on the same screen and will not let me put my information in or anything.Waste of time honestly. I thought I could use to learn the skills needed to complete School but as always a disappointment!! DO NOT GET THIS APP!!!

Working in the lab went through 4 simulations so far and it is working ok I’ll ad more later when I get farther through the labs but so far so good I found out that the app needs to be download it through your smart phone first through the website or the oculus.com down the app download the app through your cell phone and then it gets uploaded to the headset At first I was trying to download it through the headset and install it to the headset would not work nothing would work and through the headset with the browser nothing would run properly I finally download it through the smart phone and then it got uploaded from the cell phone to the headset everything’s working OK so far￼￼

I went through the process my school instructed us to do and I cannot log in. It only lets me put ONE letter on my username and then it goes nowhere. Not sure if this is a school issue or app error. Tried deleting and redownloading also.
